name: Gigimon
description: A four-legged Baby Digimon that grew from Jyarimon . Its physical features resemble those of Tokomon , and powerful fangs also line the interior of its mouth. However, unlike Tokomon, who evolves into the Mammal-species, Gigimon, who evolves into the Dragon-species, has a rough personality and is ferocious despite its small size. There are more than a few even larger Digimon who were deceived by its appearance and suffered a counterattack. Its Special Move is snapping at the opponent ( Hot Bite ). Its body temperature is hot, just like Jyarimon, and it is said that it leaves burns on the areas it bites.
